# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
def score(age, frequency, recency, size, cache_size, now):
    """Higher score = keep; lowest-scored resident is evicted.
    Optimized hybrid: Stronger recency weighting (3.0) to capture temporal locality
    and recent churn, balanced by stable frequency and normalized age penalties.
    """
    return frequency + 3.0 / (recency + 1) - (age / (now + 1))
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
